title: rubus hirtus var. floccosus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. floccosus, also known as the bramble or raspberry bush, is a thorny shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. floccosus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive and immune system health. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
